description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton with a pointed top and a green plastic screw cap. The front panel features the brand name 'Наш Сік' and an image of cherries, indicating the cherry flavor. The sides of the carton are predominantly green with white text and graphics, including product information and illustrations of juice packs. One side displays a photo of two children and additional product details. The packaging is made of laminated cardboard, likely with an inner foil or plastic lining to preserve the juice. The overall design is clean and modern, with a mix of green and white colors and clear branding.
description: A green and white rectangular juice carton with a screw cap and cherry imagery, branded 'Наш Сік'. The packaging features product information and child-friendly graphics.
description_view_0: The side view shows a green panel with white text and small images of juice packs.
description_view_1: The front view displays the brand 'Наш Сік', a green screw cap, and a vivid cherry illustration.
description_view_2: This view mirrors view 0, showing the same green side panel with product information.
description_view_3: This side features a photo of two children and additional product details in white on a green background.
